It's that time of year... Design a Block 2026! Tune in this hour to order our beautiful new panel - it's our favourite yet!
Jennie Rayment is demonstrating this gorgeous traditional-looking patchwork quilt, with its subtle autumnal colours.
Discover the essential tools every maker needs!
...Dresden Swirlie: Jennie Rayment shows us how to tinker with texture this hour!
Fall in love with beautifully curated quilt kits, packed with coordinating fabrics and clear instructions to help you create stunning quilts with confidence.
From a humble needlecraft shop in 1990 to one of the UK's leading papercraft manufacturers, Hunkydory provides quality and quantity for new and established crafters alike.
Join Jess in her passion creating bespoke paper art pieces. Every piece is unique, often following a general silhouette or template.
Since 1977, Sizzix have led with imaginative solutions for every creative lifestyle.

Join Hayley as she introduces the Crochet Society. Whether you're an adventurous beginner or a confident crocheter, these kits make it easy to enjoy a colourful crochet experience.

Featuring beautifully crafted essentials inspired by iconic patterns, these tools combine practicality with classic style for makers who appreciate detail.

Founded in the Netherlands, Studio Light has been a beloved name in the craft industry for over 40 years, inspiring creativity and innovation among crafters worldwide.
